sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57235" key="khroxi/twn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρο-χίτων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n57235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clad in wax</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λαμπάς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.249</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
